EmailTemplate.name: AN - Onboarding pack Final reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Final reminder to complete Onboarding with Alliance Nursing
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
FINAL REMINDER TO UPLOAD YOUR DOCUMENTATION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
In order to proceed with you application we need copies of your qualification and training certificates, as well as few other compliance documents.
Please head to the Alliance Portal to complete your documentation:
MY ALLIANCE PORTAL
If you're no longer interested in proceeding with you application, this will be our last attempt to contact you. Any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
